choreography.action: load the parent hub routing table and shared references

choose at most one private procedure card (discovery_question_round.md for missing material brief facts, aesthetic_direction.md for greenfield direction without a stronger brand/system, wireframe_exploration.md for low-fidelity structure or storyboard, variation_set.md for multiple high-fidelity directions or alternatives, prototype_flow_spec.md for prototype/demo/stateful interaction briefs, deck_direction_spec.md for slide deck or presentation design) matching the request, or ../shared/procedures/polish_gate_orchestration.md for final polish spanning multiple design dimensions; cite the selected card's relative path in the plan or proof line, or state 'Procedure applied: none - baseline interface workflow' if no card matches
load mode references and assets as the work requires, then apply the interface workflow to $ARGUMENTS
prepare implementation handoff only when accepted design output moves to code
